creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
Some access points are making a lot of noise in the kernel messages such as :

ath0: bad series1 hwrate 0x19, tries 3 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series2 hwrate 0x1a, tries 4 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series3 hwrate 0x1b, tries 2 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series3 hwrate 0x1b, tries 2 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series3 hwrate 0x1b, tries 2 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series3 hwrate 0x1b, tries 2 ts_status 0x0
ath0: bad series3 hwrate 0x1b, tries 2 ts_status 0x0
